description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a glass canopy cockpit positioned at the front. The wings are sharply swept back and seamlessly integrated into the body, giving it a bird-like, organic appearance. The tail section is elongated and tapers to a single vertical stabilizer, with a horizontal stabilizer at the base. The exterior is primarily white and gray with orange accents along the edges and around the cockpit. The surface appears smooth and metallic, with visible panel lines and a glossy finish. No visible engines or landing gear are present, suggesting a design focused on aerodynamics and minimalism.
description: A futuristic, streamlined airplane with swept-back wings, a glass canopy cockpit, and orange accents on a white and gray body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, swept-back wings and the prominent glass canopy cockpit at the nose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, the smooth integration of the wing, and the single vertical tail fin.
description_view_2: Top view displaying the full wingspan, the central cockpit, and the symmetrical, bird-like shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the cockpit, wing, and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept-back wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles; integrated into the fuselage for a seamless appearance.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the fuselage, wings, or tail.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer at the base.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a large glass canopy, likely single-seat.
